query:
UPDATE schedule_slots ss
SET currentParticipants = (
  SELECT COUNT(*)
  FROM bookings b
  WHERE b.scheduleSlotId = ss.id
  AND b.status IN ('pending', 'confirmed')
)
WHERE ss.id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT ss2.id
    FROM schedule_slots ss2
    WHERE ss2.currentParticipants != (
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings b2
      WHERE b2.scheduleSlotId = ss2.id
      AND b2.status IN ('pending', 'confirmed')
    )
  ) AS mismatched
);

UPDATE schedule_slots ss
SET currentParticipants = (
  SELECT COUNT(*)
  FROM bookings b
  WHERE b.scheduleSlotId = ss.id
  AND b.status IN ('pending', 'confirmed')
)
WHERE ss.id IN (
  SELECT id FROM (
    SELECT ss2.id
    FROM schedule_slots ss2
    WHERE ss2.currentParticipants != (
      SELECT COUNT(*) FROM bookings b2
      WHERE b2.scheduleSlotId = ss2.id
      AND b2.status IN ('pending', 'confirmed')
    )
  ) AS mismatched
);
